title: Reaper Leviathan
description: A mod that adds Reaper Leviathan from “Subnautica” to the deep oceans of Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds Subnautica's “Reaper Leviathan” to Minecraft's deep oceans. A giant intimidating sea creature that terrorizes the deep oceans!


Minecraft's oceans are still very peaceful and easy, so why not make things more interesting by putting a giant sea creature in them? The Reaper Leviathan mod adds the iconic creature from “Subnautica” to Minecraft's deep oceans, to make aquatic exploration more challenging! Just like the Warden in Minecraft, (and the Reaper in Subnautica) the Leviathan is a dangerous obstacle in your Adventure to be faced with caution, making exploration in the game less monotonous and exciting!


(The Leviathan can be found in the deep oceans of Minecraft)
